shorshe
Bengali word for mustard; dishes named shorshe (e.g. shorshe ilish) are mustard-paste based
sarson
Punjabi/Hindi word for mustard; 'sarson ka saag' is mustard-greens based
kasundi
Bengali condiment made from fermented mustard seeds
piccalilli
British piccalilli relish classically includes mustard seed/powder alongside turmeric
deviled egg
Classic deviled egg filling includes prepared/dry mustard
branston
Branston pickle's published recipe includes mustard flour
carolina gold
South Carolina 'Carolina Gold' BBQ sauce is a distinct mustard-based style
salad cream
British salad cream standardly contains mustard flour/extract
rarebit
Welsh rarebit's cheese sauce traditionally includes mustard powder
remoulade
Classic French and Danish remoulade sauces are mustard-based
chowchow
Southern US chow-chow relish is often mustard-based, though recipes vary
achaar
Many Indian achaar pickles are made with mustard oil and/or whole mustard seeds
crab cake
Maryland-style crab cakes commonly include dry/prepared mustard in the binder
poriyal
South Indian poriyal is stir-fried with a mustard-seed tempering
sambar
South Indian sambar is typically finished with a mustard-seed tadka
masala dosa
The potato filling is commonly tempered with mustard seeds
